_comment: Vibe Center canonical skills manifest. install.sh syncs this file to ~/.vibe/skills.json and init.sh consumes it. Codex/Claude primary skills now use plugins; npx skills is only for agents that still require Markdown skill installs.

global._comment: Codex/Claude plugin-backed skills are not installed through npx skills. Add agents/packages here only for non-plugin Markdown-skill agents.

project._comment: Project-visible local skills are linked by scripts/init.sh
